view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the conversion linkage to orders and rewards, but the evidence provided does not confirm this linkage. While there are successful booking orders, there is no explicit evidence showing how these bookings are linked to rewards or how conversions are tracked in relation to orders. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to validate the requirement is missing.
